## 📌 Summary of Changes
Provide a high-level summary of what changed in this PR and why.

## 🛠️ Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix (vulnerability patching or auth enhancement)
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX craft improvement (styling, animation, layout)
- [ ] 🚀 Performance / SEO optimization
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update

## 🧪 Testing & Verification
Describe the unit, integration, or manual test steps executed to verify these changes.

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passed cleanly
- [ ] `npm test -w server` (Vitest suite) passed cleanly
- [ ] Verified manually in browser with DevTools console open

## 📸 Screenshots / Visual Verification (UI Changes Only)
Attach before/after screenshots or GIFs demonstrating UI updates.
